scope.selection_note: Codex-only post-ingest identity cleanup prep for ROUTE and CORRIDOR duplicate_global_identity rows only. Inputs were current data/canonical/routes.jsonl, data/canonical/corridors.jsonl, data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and allowed in-process validateRepo duplicate_global_identity output.
scope.write_limit: Only this review note was written. No identity overrides, LOG.md, manifest, canonical JSONL, DB, wiki, submissions, or other files were edited.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_q53-ltd-woodhaven-2014 and route_q53-sbs-ace share identity key route_q53-sbs.

description: Existing limited bus route on Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor, basis for SBS service
Limited-stop bus route on Woodhaven / Cross Bay corridor. Proposed SBS route based on existing Q52/53 LTD bus route.
Existing Q53 Limited bus route that the proposed SBS is based on

target.display_name: Q53 SBS on Woodhaven Boulevard, Queens (TSP in development)

description: SBS route on Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards corridor
Q53 Select Bus Service planned for Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards corridor
Proposed Q53 Select Bus Service on Woodhaven / Cross Bay corridor
Proposed SBS route along Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards based on the Q53 LTD route

source_evidence.quote: Based on the existing Q52/53 LTD bus route
Fall 2017: Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service Launches
Q52/Q53 SBS will be 15-25% faster than the Q52/Q53 LTD
Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service (SBS) launched in November 2017
Q53-SBS, Broadway / Queens Blvd / Woodhaven Blvd / Cross Bay Blvd

proposed_aliases.reason: The alias is the Q53 Limited predecessor/basis for the same Woodhaven/Cross Bay service later represented as Q53 SBS. This route-variant-looking merge is included because the canonical descriptions and source evidence explicitly state that Q52/Q53 SBS launched from the Q52/Q53 LTD service context.

guards.route_variant_guard: accepted because source evidence explicitly ties Q53 LTD to the Q52/Q53 SBS launch and replacement/improvement context

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_b44-brt-phase2 and route_b44-sbs share identity key route_b44.

target.display_name: Nostrand Avenue-Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service (B44)

description: B44 Limited will become SBS on Nostrand Avenue/Rogers Avenue corridor
Proposed SBS service on Nostrand/Rogers corridor. B44 Limited will become SBS.
B44 Limited being replaced by B44 SBS

source_evidence.quote: Nostrand Avenue SBS ... Existing B44 bus service carries 44,000 trips a day; new service planned for 2011
B44 SBS replaces the B44 Limited
B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before.
B44 Nostrand/Rogers Avenues Select Bus Service Begins November 17, 2013

proposed_aliases.reason: The alias is a one-source Phase II/Phase I planned Nostrand Avenue SBS route record keyed to existing B44 service, not a B44 local-only or B44 Limited record. The target is the implemented B44 SBS record for Nostrand/Rogers with explicit source evidence that B44 SBS replaced B44 Limited and began service in 2013.

guards.route_variant_guard: accepted because the alias evidence says Nostrand Avenue SBS/new service planned for existing B44 service; the known B44 Limited/B44 SBS do-not-merge pair was not used as the proposed alias pair

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_b46-brt-phase2 and route_b46-local-limited-20110915 share identity key route_b46.

description: B46 bus route on Utica Avenue, running from Williamsburg Bridge Plaza to Kings Plaza. Second busiest bus route in NYC. Over 49,000 passengers per weekday.

B46 bus route along Utica Avenue in Brooklyn. Second-busiest bus route in NYC, carrying nearly 50,000 passengers per day. Includes B46 Limited and B46 Local service. Proposed for upgrade to B46 SBS (Select Bus Service).

source_evidence.quote: Utica Avenue corridor ... Existing B46 bus service carries 52,000 trips a day
B46 is the second busiest bus route in NYC
B46 local buses make all stops. B46 Limited-Stop buses operate 7 days a week.
map illustrates the B46 bus route in Brooklyn, starting at Williamsburg Bridge Plaza and ending at Kings Plaza

proposed_aliases.reason: The alias is a one-source Phase II Utica Avenue/B46 base-route mention. The target is the richer generic B46 local-and-limited route record on Utica Avenue, so this proposal avoids collapsing the base route directly into the SBS variant while still resolving the duplicate route_b46 identity row.

guards.route_variant_guard: accepted as a base-route duplicate, not as a local/limited/SBS variant collapse

proposal_guards: Each proposed alias_id and target_id exists in current canonical JSONL.
No proposed alias_id is already present as a merge alias in current data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed alias_id is a current merge target in current data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed target_id is a current merge alias in current data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed pair appears in current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json.
No corridor partial-overlap proposal was included.
Route variant-looking proposals were included only where source/canonical evidence tied the records to the same route lifecycle or to a safer generic base-route record.

notable_exclusions.reason: Live validator row remains, but this pair was already prepared in codex-identity-batch179-prep.json; not repeated here.
Prior notes and current canonical evidence show the LGA record is a participant-identified future LaGuardia access idea, while the target is Webster/Third Avenue Bx55 service context.
Excluded as a partial-overlap corridor: Coney Island Avenue to Flatbush Avenue versus Flatbush Avenue to Ocean Parkway.
Excluded because the Bus Forward SBS candidate lacks source-backed limits proving it is the same corridor as the materialized Flatbush Avenue to Ocean Parkway Church Avenue project.
Excluded as same-street/different-location: Upper Manhattan Broadway versus Bronx Broadway.
Excluded as partial/different Lexington Avenue segments.
Both records are current merge targets, so neither side is eligible as the alias under the requested guards.
The safer/richer target direction would require using current merge target corridor_125th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 as alias; reverse direction would target the thinner Phase II candidate record.

Excluded in favor of route_b44-sbs because the alias source block describes Nostrand Avenue SBS/new service planned, while the B44 Limited/B44 SBS relationship is separately guarded by a do-not-merge decision.
Excluded in favor of the safer generic B46 local/limited target to avoid collapsing a one-source base-route mention directly into the SBS variant.

commands_run: bun --eval 'import { validateRepo } from "./packages/pipeline/src/validate.ts"; ... extract duplicate_global_identity route/corridor messages'
jq read-only inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
bun --eval read-only canonical JSONL summaries from data/canonical/routes.jsonl and data/canonical/corridors.jsonl
rg read-only source-block inspection for selected evidence refs

blockers: Only 3 high-confidence route/corridor proposals survived the requested guards. Most remaining live rows are route variants without sufficient lifecycle evidence, source-specific route ideas, current merge-target direction traps, current target-is-alias conflicts, or partial-overlap corridors.
